holes.content: The 2D/3D interface forms a gradually-organized multi-dimensional structure that provides continuous charge transport pathways while maintaining enhanced stability
holes.label: gradual_interface

holes.content: HTM-free solar cells and modules using hydrophobic carbon electrodes instead of organic hole transporting materials, reducing cost and improving stability
holes.label: htmc_free_config

holes.content: 2D/3D perovskite modules maintain stable performance under controlled standard conditions in the presence of oxygen and moisture
holes.label: oxygen_moisture_tolerant

holes.content: The 2D/3D perovskite architecture is compatible with fully printable industrial-scale processes for large-area module fabrication
holes.label: scalable_printable

holes.content: 2D perovskites exhibit superior stability and water resistance compared to 3D perovskites, preventing hydrolysis and irreversible degradation under moisture
holes.label: two_d_water_resistant
